Terms of Service

Effective Date: June 4, 2026 | Last Updated: June 4, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using baltimoreweddingplanner.com (the "Site"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you don't agree with any part of these Terms, please don't use the Site.

These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and anyone who accesses or uses the Site.

2. Description of Services

Baltimore Wedding Planner provides wedding planning services in Maryland, including full-service wedding planning, day-of coordination, partial planning, and elopement coordination. This website provides information about these services and allows potential clients to request free consultations.

The Site itself is an informational and lead-generation website. No purchase or service agreement is formed through the website alone. Engagement of services requires a separate written agreement between you and Baltimore Wedding Planner.

3. Free Consultation

Submitting a consultation request through our website or booking via Calendly schedules a free, no-obligation 30-minute consultation call. This consultation:

  • Does not create a service agreement or obligation to hire
  • Does not guarantee availability for your wedding date
  • Is subject to John's calendar availability
  • May be rescheduled or cancelled by either party with reasonable notice

4. Intellectual Property

All content on this Site, including text, images, graphics, blog posts, guides, checklists, and design elements, is owned by Baltimore Wedding Planner or used with permission, and is protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

You may view and print content from this Site for your personal, non-commercial use only. You may not:

  • Reproduce, distribute, or republish our content without written permission
  • Use our content for commercial purposes
  • Remove or alter any copyright or proprietary notices
  • Scrape or copy our venue guides, cost data, or other proprietary research

5. Accuracy of Information

We strive to keep information on this Site accurate and current. However, venue pricing, availability, and other details change frequently. All pricing ranges and venue information on this Site are provided for general guidance only and may not reflect current conditions.

Always verify specific venue prices, permit requirements, and vendor availability directly with the relevant parties before making decisions.

6. User Conduct

When using this Site or contacting us, you agree not to:

  • Submit false, misleading, or fraudulent information in contact forms
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of our systems
  • Use automated tools to scrape or crawl our Site
  • Transmit any malicious code, viruses, or harmful content
  • Use the Site for any illegal or unauthorized purpose

7. Third-Party Links and Services

This Site may contain links to third-party websites (such as venue websites, Maryland state permit portals, or wedding vendor sites). We provide these links for your convenience only. We don't endorse these sites and are not responsible for their content, privacy practices, or accuracy.

We use third-party services including Calendly for scheduling and Netlify for form processing. Your use of these services is subject to their own terms and privacy policies.

8. Disclaimer of Warranties

THE SITE AND ITS CONTENT ARE PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE, OR NON-INFRINGEMENT.

We don't warrant that the Site will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of viruses or other harmful components.

9. Limitation of Liability

TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, BALTIMORE WEDDING PLANNER SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARISING FROM YOUR USE OF THIS SITE OR ITS CONTENT.

Our total liability for any claim arising from your use of this Site shall not exceed $100.

This limitation applies regardless of the form of action and whether we were advised of the possibility of such damages.

10. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Maryland, United States, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of the Site shall be resolved in the courts of Baltimore, Maryland.

11. Changes to These Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes take effect when posted to this page with an updated "Last Updated" date. Your continued use of the Site after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated Terms.

12. Severability

If any provision of these Terms is found invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions continue in full force and effect.

13. Contact

For questions about these Terms:

Baltimore Wedding Planner

Baltimore, Maryland, USA

Email: john@baltimoreweddingplanner.com

Baltimore Wedding Planner

Maryland Budget Wedding Studio

Budget-friendly wedding planning for couples across Maryland. John creates beautiful, stress-free weddings for budgets under $20,000 — full-service, day-of coordination, and elopements.
